name: apple-craft
description: Apple platform development with Xcode tools, bundled references, and review workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, and Xcode support
interface.longDescription: Build, troubleshoot, review, and orchestrate Apple platform work using Xcode tools plus bundled reference docs for current Apple APIs.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose this SwiftUI build error and suggest the minimal fix.
Review this branch for Apple-platform-specific correctness risks.
Plan and implement a new Apple feature with a spec and evaluation loop.
